results.name: Basic RAG Query - Items Intent
results.ground_truth: Amethyst (wiki): A purple gemstone. Found by mining rocks in The Mines floors 1-39, inside Geodes, Frozen Geodes, Omni Geodes, and as a drop from Bugs, Cave Flies, and Grubs. Sell price: 100g. Loved by Abigail and Emily. Used in dyeing (purple dye).
results.notes: v2: relaxed answer_contains -> answer_contains_any (LLM may say 'floor' not 'level')

results.name: Basic RAG Query - Crops Intent
results.ground_truth: Cauliflower (wiki): Spring crop only. Growth time: 12 days (no regrowth — single harvest). Seed cost: 80g from Pierre. Sell price: 175g (base), 218g (silver), 262g (gold). Can become a Giant Crop if planted in 3x3 grid. Required for Spring Crops Bundle. Loved by Maru.
results.notes: v2: relaxed answer_contains -> answer_contains_any (LLM answer is correct but may not say 'spring' explicitly)

results.name: Basic RAG Query - Friendship Intent
results.ground_truth: Penny LOVED gifts (wiki): Diamond, Emerald, Melon, Poppy, Poppyseed Muffin, Red Plate, Roots Platter, Sandfish, Tom Kha Soup, All Books (including Price Catalogue, Stardrop Tea), All Universal Loves EXCEPT Rabbit's Foot. She HATES: Rabbit's Foot, Hops. She DISLIKES: Duck Feather, Wool.
results.notes: v2: relaxed answer_contains -> answer_contains_any (RAG may return some but not all gift names)

results.name: Conversation Memory - Context Retention
results.ground_truth: Most profitable summer crops (wiki): Starfruit — 13 days, seeds 400g from Sandy, sells 750g base (iridium 1125g). Blueberry — 13 days initial, regrows every 4 days, yields 3 berries per harvest, best for repeat income. Red Cabbage (year 2+) — 9 days, sells 260g.
results.notes: Tests conversation memory within session. Second question has no explicit topic.

results.name: Off-Topic Rejection
results.ground_truth: N/A - Agent should politely decline and redirect to Stardew Valley topics.
results.notes: Tests guardrails. Answer should NOT mention Paris or France at all.

results.name: RAG Retrieval Failure - Mixed Intent Query (Known Limitation)
results.capability: RAG Retrieval Failure - Mixed Intent Query (Known Limitation)
results.ground_truth: Penny LOVED gifts from wiki: Diamond, Emerald, Melon, Poppy, Poppyseed Muffin, Red Plate, Roots Platter, Sandfish, Tom Kha Soup, All Books, All Universal Loves (except Rabbit's Foot). Poppy IS a loved gift for Penny despite being a universally liked flower — her individual taste overrides the universal rule. The agent incorrectly said Penny likes flowers EXCLUDING Poppy, which is factually wrong. Root cause: RAG retrieved generic flower/universal rules chunk instead of Penny's individual gift table.
results.notes: KNOWN FAILURE (intermittent) — mixed CROPS+FRIENDSHIP query causes RAG to retrieve universal flower rules instead of Penny specific Love list. System incorrectly excludes Poppy. LLM non-determinism means this fails ~50% of runs. Demonstrates RAG limitation on ambiguous cross-intent queries.

results.name: Unknown Intent - General Stardew Query
results.ground_truth: Calico Desert access (wiki): Repair the Bus at the Bus Stop by completing the Vault Bundle in the Community Center (requires 42,500g total across 4 sub-bundles) OR by purchasing the Joja Community Development Form for 40,000g. Once repaired, Pam drives the bus daily for 500g per trip (except rainy days and festivals).
results.notes: Tests UNKNOWN/DEFAULT intent routing still produces a useful answer

results.name: Out-of-KB Query - Graceful Degradation
results.ground_truth: N/A - There is no in-game cheat code. Agent should say it doesn't have this info or redirect.
results.notes: Tests that agent doesn't hallucinate answers not in the knowledge base

results.name: Multi-turn Action - Friendship Plan (3 params)
results.ground_truth: Elliott LOVED gifts (wiki): Crab Cakes, Duck Feather, Lobster, Pomegranate, Tom Kha Soup, All Universal Loves. Birthday: Fall 5. Marriage candidate — requires 10 hearts + bouquet, then Mermaid Pendant. From 2 hearts needs 8 more hearts (2000 friendship points) to reach 10 hearts.
results.notes: Tests full multi-turn action flow with a different villager than the original tests

results.name: Multi-turn Action - Farm Plan (2 params)
results.ground_truth: Farm planning (wiki): Parsnip — 20g seed, 4 days growth, sells 35g base. Potato — 50g seed, 6 days growth, sells 80g base (bonus potato chance on harvest). With 8 plots and 2000g: can plant ~40 parsnips (800g seeds) with 1200g remaining for potatoes or cauliflower.
results.notes: v2: changed trigger phrase to 'Help me create a farm plan' which matches actions.py keywords exactly

results.name: Single-turn Action - Save Favorites
results.ground_truth: Harvey loves: Coffee, Pickles, Truffle Oil (per actions.py mock data). Leah loves: Goat Cheese, Salad, Wine (per actions.py mock data).
results.notes: v2: updated answer_contains_any to match updated actions.py gift data (Coffee/Pickles/Truffle Oil for Harvey, Goat Cheese/Salad/Wine for Leah)

results.name: Error Handling - Invalid Heart Level (too high)
results.capability: Error Handling - Invalid Heart Level (too high)
results.ground_truth: Heart level must be 0-10. 20 is invalid. After correction with 4, system should ask for gifts per week.

results.name: Error Handling - Invalid Budget (negative number)
results.ground_truth: Budget must be positive (>0). -500 is invalid. 4000 is valid and should trigger plan completion.

results.name: Error Handling - Completely Invalid Villager Names
results.capability: Error Handling - Completely Invalid Villager Names
results.ground_truth: Gandalf and Hermione are not valid Stardew Valley villagers. System should not crash — reject gracefully or ask for valid names.
results.notes: Tests edge case: zero valid villagers extracted.

results.name: Error Handling - Fuzzy Matching Misspelled Names
results.capability: Error Handling - Fuzzy Matching Misspelled Names
results.ground_truth: 'Emly' should fuzzy-match to Emily. 'Shain' should fuzzy-match to Shane.
results.notes: Tests fuzzy matching with different misspellings than the original test

results.name: Sequential Independent RAG Questions - Same Session
results.capability: Sequential Independent RAG Questions - Same Session
results.ground_truth: Q1: Upgrade watering can at Clint the Blacksmith — costs copper/iron/gold/iridium bar + 2000/5000/10000/25000g, takes 2 days. Q2: Shane loved gifts: Beer, Hot Pepper, Pepper Poppers, Pizza. Birthday: Spring 20. Q3: Iron ore found in The Mines floors 40-79. Most common around floors 40-70.
results.notes: Tests that three completely unrelated questions in the same session are all answered correctly. Verifies no context bleeding — watering can answer should not affect Shane answer, etc.
